figures.caption: Fig. 4: Score and behavior histograms of the different models along with the baselines. Histograms (a), (b), (c), (d) et (e) are computed over the whole Test set (one value per context). Histogram (f) is computed over the different switches (one value per switch). The scale of the vertical axis is linear, and is shared between histograms of the same row. In (b), (c), (d) and (f), Dirac peaks are cropped for the sake of readability.
